title: Content. A Quatrain.
content:
Among the meadows of Life's sad unease
 In labor still renewing her soul's youth
 With trust, for patience, and with love, for peace,
 Singing she goes with the calm face of Ruth.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Content. A Quatrain."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
